errors.message: Subject-verb agreement error; should be 'we are building' for clarity.

errors.text: you can pay to on average 5%
the LTV is higher and most importantly ratio of LTV to customer acquisition cost is higher too
errors.correction: the LTV is higher and most importantly, the ratio of LTV to customer acquisition cost is higher too

errors.text: the revenue that they had on on the cohort weekly cohort in 60 days
errors.correction: the revenue that they had on the weekly cohort in 60 days

errors.text: what you would do when your life will be different
errors.correction: what you would do when your life is different
errors.message: Verb tense error; 'will be' should be 'is' for conditional statements.

errors.text: the more anxious they become about their situation the more
errors.correction: the more anxious they become about their situation, the more
errors.message: Missing comma in a compound sentence.

errors.text: the the biggest legos on the market

errors.text: you will get these results it it's not fixed
errors.correction: you will get these results; it's not fixed
errors.message: Missing punctuation; should be a semicolon.

errors.text: we can ask like what's your position tell me about your job
